overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a bioluminescent tribal village at night. The character traverses bamboo walkways, passes through an organic tunnel structure, and ascends stairs through a tiered settlement with NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical village pathway with bamboo walkways

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along bamboo pathway toward a large organic tunnel structure

entered.detail: elevated pathway constructed from bamboo poles
wooden structure with thatched roof and smoke rising
tall tropical palm trees surrounding the path
large organic archway entrance made of woven branches

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated bamboo pathway through a tropical tribal village at night. Dense vegetation and palm trees surround the path, with a wooden hut visible to the left and a large organic tunnel structure ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered bamboo tunnel with woven walls

events.description: enters the covered tunnel structure with woven bamboo walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the illuminated tunnel toward the distant exit

entered.detail: organic tunnel structure made of woven branches and roots
intricately woven bamboo walls forming the tunnel sides
warm glowing lights hanging from the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow enclosed tunnel constructed from woven bamboo and organic materials. Warm artificial lights illuminate the path ahead as the character progresses toward the tunnel exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated tribal village with tiered housing and bioluminescent lighting

events.description: exits the tunnel into an open village area with green bioluminescent lights
villagers and NPCs become visible walking along the pathway

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs through the tiered village while passing by NPCs

notable_agents.action: villager descending the stairs wearing tribal clothing

entered.detail: steep staircase constructed from bamboo logs leading upward
bioluminescent green orbs embedded in the village structures
multi-level organic dwellings built into the hillside
decorative stone bridge connecting village tiers

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel, the character ascends a steep bamboo staircase through a tiered tribal village illuminated by green bioluminescent lights. The environment features organic architecture with stone arch bridges and multi-level dwellings. Villagers appear walking along the pathways as the character continues upward through the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a tropical tribal village at night, transitioning from an open jungle path into a confined tunnel and finally ascending into a glowing, tiered settlement. It begins with the character walking along an elevated bamboo pathway surrounded by dense vegetation and palm trees, moving steadily toward a large organic structure. As the character enters this structure, the scene shifts into a narrow, enclosed tunnel of woven bamboo illuminated by warm artificial lights. The camera then follows the character as they emerge from the tunnel and ascend a steep bamboo staircase, where the lighting transforms into a vibrant green bioluminescence. Finally, the environment expands into a multi-level village featuring stone arch bridges and organic dwellings, with villagers appearing along the pathways as the character continues their upward climb.
